data.name: SENRAN KAGURA Peach Beach Splash
data.detailed_description:
賭上性命來發光閃耀。

突然被帶到在忍者世界中存在已久的謎之水槍大會「PEACH BEACH SPLASH」，縮寫「PBS」會場的忍者們。

根據不管怎麼看都很可疑，而且好像在哪見過的Mr. K和Miss R的說明，這個大會基本上規定需以水槍戰鬥，全面禁止使用忍者的特殊能力，且PBS結束前誰都不能離開這座島嶼。

大會中不分善忍或惡忍等先前的立場，獲得優勝後似乎就能得到任何想要的東西…。　

究竟是誰為了什麼目的舉辦了這場PBS呢？要解開這個謎，就只能在大會中一路贏到最後了。

少女們的夏日故事，現在，即將開始。

『Sexy Soaker Limited Edition』包含了下列道具：
1.『閃亂神樂 PEACH BEACH SPLASH』遊戲本篇
2. 含主題曲之原聲帶
3. 艷夏乳乳特選５款DLC合輯包
　・服裝：「濕透透高中生」
　・服裝：「閃亮亮彩虹比基尼７色套組」
　・特殊武器：「太卷壽司火箭砲」
　・伴魔卡片：「貝貝MK-II」
　・技能卡片：「乳乳DX技能卡套組」

本作品特徵

  • 全身上下都濕透透的天堂！
    少女們將以性能與特徵都不同的10種水槍為武器，四處穿梭奔跑！
    胸部和屁股都是射擊目標！拼命射擊、渾身濕透的超胸爆乳水仗！！

  • 豐富的線上模式
    線上模式中最高可進行5對5的小隊戰，也能進行合作生存戰模式。此外，配對可選擇僅以自己的地區、或以全世界為對象。在晉級戰中勝出，以全世界最胸的忍者為目標吧！

  • 收錄810種以上的美麗卡片
    本作品中有810種以上的卡片，分成「武器」、「技能」以及「伴魔」3種類。其中也包含了能強化我方隊伍全體，或使對手隊伍弱化的卡片，所以請好好組合它們，讓戰鬥情勢對我方有利吧！

  • 比Estival Versus更加進化的更衣室！
    除了服裝外，也能夠享受髮型、配件以及內衣褲搭配的樂趣唷！而且配件還能進行比之前更細微&簡單的位置調整喔！！在前作中也相當受歡迎的場景模式內，也新增了許多新姿勢喔！！

data.short_description: 這次的閃亂神樂將掀開動作射擊！？爆乳水仗的序幕！ 以盛夏祭典「PEACH BEACH SPLASH」為舞台，總人數超過30名的少女們將懷抱著自己的信念，手持水槍，展開決戰！！而且還能夠欣賞描繪出少女們的日常的外傳喔。
data.supported_languages:
英文, 法文, 日文*, 韓文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+, 64-bit OS
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-550 @ 3.2 GHz (2-core)
  • 記憶體: 6 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTS 450
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 22 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Compatible with DirectX 11.0
  • VR 支援: SteamVR
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+, 64-bit OS
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-6400 @ 3.2 GHz / AMD A8-6500 @ 3.50 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 950 / AMD Radeon R7 360
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 22 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Compatible with DirectX 11.0

data.name: SENRAN KAGURA Peach Beach Splash
data.detailed_description:
The summer of bouncy, high-flying hijinks continues for the girls of SENRAN KAGURA! They've fought rival ninja, evil masterminds, and apocalyptic demons from beyond the veil of sanity, but nothing—NOTHING in their lives has ever prepared them for...a water gun fight?!

Summoned to a mysterious tournament by its shady organizers, the buxom shinobi students team up and face off, using all kinds of water weapons to soak and splash their opponents. As they rise through the tournament brackets, they'll uncover the secrets behind the organization － secrets that hide an ever-growing threat to... Wait, what? Sorry, I was watching all the splashing.

Choose a team of five from the more than 30 girls available, outfit them with customizable weapons and abilities, lead them through lighthearted water gun battles across five single-player storylines, or join your friends online and take on opposing teams worldwide. Come on in; the water's great!

The "Sexy Soaker" edition includes the Soaking Wet High School Uniform costume, a set of colorful bikini costumes, the Futomaki Roll Bazooka special weapon, a Bebeby pet card, and a special set of skill cards, along with a downloadable soundtrack containing 47 music tracks.

KEY FEATURES

  • Water, Water Everywhere
    Water powers not only the girls' 10 types of water weapons, but their state-of-the-art hydro-jetpacks, which are used to fly and slide around each large arena at will.

  • Splash Across the Seven Seas
    Go online, with players in your region or worldwide, for 5-on-5 team battles and survival matches. Climb the rankings and prove you're the top shinobi.

  • Stack the Deck Your Way
    With over 800 attribute cards available, providing improved weapons, unique skills, and summonable pets, players can equip any combination of 6 skill cards and 3 pet cards per match for a combo their opponents will never see coming.

  • Become Bosom Buddies
    The dressing room returns with all-new methods of interaction (including squirt guns, of course). Customize each character’s outfit, but be forewarned that it may not be fully intact (or opaque!) by the time the match ends.

data.short_description: The buxom shinobi of SENRAN KAGURA are back, and they've traded their katanas for water guns in this Third-Person Splasher! Customize your team, lead them through battles across a sprawling single-player campaign, or go online and take on teams worldwide. Come on in; the water's great!
data.supported_languages:
English, French, Japanese*, Korean, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7+, 64-bit OS
  • Processor: Intel Core i3-550 @ 3.2 GHz (2-core)
  • Memory: 6 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTS 450
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 22 GB available space
  • Sound Card: Compatible with DirectX 11.0
  • VR Support: SteamVR
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS *: Windows 7+, 64-bit OS
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-6400 @ 3.2 GHz / AMD A8-6500 @ 3.50 GHz
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 950 / AMD Radeon R7 360
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 22 GB available space
  • Sound Card: Compatible with DirectX 11.0
